response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior generalist with solid engineering craftsmanship, but he does not meet the role's mandatory requirements: his professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments (2014-2015) plus a thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years on Windows; his database background is MySQL/MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle; and his financial exposure (a German investment platform, RIDE Capital) is web fintech, not fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking systems.
strengths: Deep senior-level engineering experience across web, backend, and systems, with strong TDD/CI/CD discipline
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Some financial-sector exposure at RIDE Capital and broad polyglot adaptability (D, Java, C#, TypeScript)
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on the Windows platform
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain knowledge, and no Summit platform exposure

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and low-latency systems background
